original_image_tags: A single page of aged, off-white paper with visible lined background. The paper has handwritten notes in blue ink at the top. The lower two-thirds of the page shows faint, reverse-imprinted text from the other side (bleed-through), including a column of names and titles and the faint outline of a "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp at the bottom. A black hole-punch mark is visible at the bottom center. A small red ink mark is on the right edge.

elements.description: A blue 'RECEIVED' stamp with the number 2 and the text 'DEPARTMENT OF JUSTICE' visible in the upper right corner.

judge.reason: Description A describes a page with handwritten notes and bleed-through text, while Description B describes a specific blue 'RECEIVED' stamp, which are entirely different visual content with no overlap.
